title: The Journey Turns Toward Yuba
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on the journey turns toward yuba, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Journey Turns Toward Yuba. The crew moves across Alabasta as Vivi explains the rebellion, Crocodile’s manipulation, and the need to stop the civil war. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.
